channel.title: Titoyin — Nigeria's News, Media & Lifestyle Platform
channel.description: The latest Nigerian and international news, politics, entertainment, fashion, and trending stories.

item.title: Nigeria's Economic Recovery Plan: What the New Budget Means for Every Nigerian Household
item.description: As the National Assembly debates the latest spending proposals, economists and ordinary Nigerians are asking the same question — who actually benefits?
item.author: editorial@titoyin.com (Titoyin Editorial Desk)

item.title: Senate Passes Electoral Amendment Bill on Third Reading
item.description: Lawmakers voted 87 to 12 in favour of changes to the Electoral Act that will affect how candidates are nominated by political parties.
item.author: editorial@titoyin.com (Politics Desk)

item.title: Afrobeats Goes Global: Nigerian Artists Break Billboard Records
item.description: A historic week for Nigerian music as three artists simultaneously chart in the Billboard Hot 100.
item.author: editorial@titoyin.com (Entertainment Desk)
